text:
Legendary athlete Eliud Kipchoge is thirsting for more. Cruising to two back-to-back Olympic marathon victories isn't enough.The former marathon world record holder and the first man to run under two hours in a sensational 42km challenge will be heading to the 2024 Paris in August for a historic straight third win.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Inspired Kipchoge eager to wear another crown at Olympic Games
author: Stephen Rutto
description: The two-time Olympic champion is in inspired form ahead of Paris Games.
